message:
chore: add MCP configs and runtime SQLite to .gitignore

Ignores agent MCP bridge config files (cline.mcp.json, cursor.mcp.json,
gemini.mcp.json, opencode.json, windsurf.mcp.json) and runtime SQLite
database files that were cluttering git status on every run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -53,3 +53,16 @@ next-env.d.ts
 .bv/
 .env
 .claude/settings.local.json
+
+# MCP config files (contain local bearer tokens)
+cline.mcp.json
+codex.mcp.json
+cursor.mcp.json
+gemini.mcp.json
+opencode.json
+windsurf.mcp.json
+*.mcp.json.*.bak
+
+# Runtime SQLite databases
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
